raw_consumer_statement:
Barclays called me on XX/XX/2026 with a suspicious transaction in the amount of {$1800.00} at a XXXX store in XXXX, XXXX. I disputed the transaction as I did not make the purchase and the credit card was in my possession at all times. Barcalys cancelled the credit card. On XX/XX/2026 Barclays declined our dispute stating the transaction was valid as it was an in person sale. I was not notified by Barclays of this decision. 
On XX/XX/2026 I received an email with a new monthly statement with a charge of {$1800.00} outstanding due XX/XX/2026. I called Barclays on XX/XX/2026 and re-opened the investigation into the fraud charge. But in the mean time, I am still responsible for a payment of {$1800.00} on XX/XX/2026.
